It’s difficult to predict what will happen next, but with our practical guidance, you can feel confident you’re making the right move.
Mortgage rates have eased, but for how long?
The UK inflation rate has fallen to 2.8%, in positive news for those looking to secure a mortgage. However, with ongoing international events, it is unclear whether this easing will continue.

With a possible bumpy ride ahead, people looking to purchase a new property or remortgage their home might look to find a new rate before the end of their current deal, while the immediate circumstances are more favourable.
Buying a house: Is now the right time?
This year, house price growth has slowed, but many potential buyers will have been deterred by the wider economic uncertainty.

column2: A leading property website has shared data which indicates that new home sales are at an 11-year high. Therefore, the property market is currently better for buyers than sellers, pushed up by the number of properties available. In some parts of the UK, house prices are even falling, particularly in London and the South of England.

column1: So, could you bag a bargain, or is there more to consider?

You must be certain that you can afford the costs that buying a house would bring, with an eye on inflation, or if you can sell your house for what you think it’s worth. Read our guide <https://click.email.landc.co.uk/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4ODh9ADIAAAAAAIVco-gjXwXtpQXWdqDsBcHedKt8rZLWRBqFrZ9-wBeMpvs-wTYZ2UTDXb3C_D_M8sLLAC47AkeVRiOGGB-X7P3odta5awVn8TeVFhe6tg>  on possible pitfalls for getting a mortgage. If you could do with some guidance, speak to one of our expert advisers who do this every day, so you can move forward with confidence…
What affects your ability to remortgage might be unclear to you, and knowing what information you need to decide can seem confusing. That’s ok.
Take a look at our remortgaging guide, so you can speak to one of our advisers with a clearer picture.
Thinking about remortgaging? Making a big decision like this is far easier with insight.
Our Mortgage Calculator can help you see what you could save by switching to a new deal, and also predict what your monthly payments could look like.
Think carefully before securing other debts against your home.
Your home or property may be repossessed if you do not keep up repayments on your mortgage.

Update on the Project Manager Role at Arch Systems,"Hello Dennis,
I trust this message finds you well. I wanted to personally express our gratitude for your interest in joining the team at Arch Systems.
Following a thorough and competitive selection process, we have successfully filled the Project Manager role with a candidate whose qualifications closely align with our needs.
We understand that this news may be disappointing, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience it may cause you.

Please rest assured that your enthusiasm and qualifications did not go unnoticed. We recognize the effort you invested in your application, and we genuinely appreciate your interest in being a part of Arch Systems.

Although we cannot proceed with your application for the Project Manager role, we encourage you to stay connected with us. New opportunities frequently arise, and your skills could align seamlessly with our needs in the future. To stay updated on these opportunities, we recommend keeping an eye on our dynamic Career Page <https://archsys.io/jobs/> .

Once again, thank you for considering Arch Systems as a potential employer. We appreciate your understanding of our current circumstances, and we extend our best wishes as you continue your job search journey.

Thank you for your recent application to the Transformation Lead role at Pencil. After consideration, we have decided not to move forward with your application at this time. We have been fortunate enough to receive a number of applications, some of which have experience more closely aligned with what we're looking for in this role.
Please do keep an eye on our LinkedIn and careers pages for latest job opportunities, and we would welcome future applications.

Thank you for your interest in the Project Manager - Security role at VALR and for taking the time to submit your application.

VALR is a unique place to work, and we place significant importance on finding the right long-term fit for both our team and prospective candidates. As part of our broader hiring plans, we’ve decided to shift the timeline for this role to later in the year, and therefore we will not be proceeding with an active recruitment process for the position at this stage.
We encourage you to keep an eye on our current openings by contacting careers@valr.com <mailto:careers@valr.com>  for updates on roles we are actively recruiting for.
Thank you once again for your interest in joining VALR. We truly appreciate the time and effort you invested in your application.
Thank you for choosing to apply for this post within HM Revenue and Customs.
The selection panel have carefully considered all applications for this post. Unfortunately, on this occasion, we will not be proceeding with your application.
We appreciate the time you have invested in making your application and understand that this must be disappointing news.
We encourage you to apply for any future posts with HM Revenue and Customs for which you qualify. Thank you again for your application and best wishes with your job search.
HM Revenue and Customs Recruitment Team
